summary: Iteration 88 testing complete. Verified all BarristerView.jsx merge logic rewrite features: 1) MERGE_CATEGORIES exists with 15 categories, 2) classifySection function correctly categorises sections using keyword patterns, 3) parseAnalysis function splits content by ## headings, 4) mergeAllReports uses category-based logic (categoryBuckets, picks best content per category), 5) cleanSentence truncates to max 80 characters, 6) Old helper functions removed (selectDistinctParagraphs, buildSynthesisSection), 7) Section titles use text-slate-900 (visible dark text), 8) Table of Contents shows fixed structural sections (I-VI), 9) Frontend compiles without errors, 10) Backend health check works.

merge_categories_exists.details: MERGE_CATEGORIES constant exists at line 657 with 15 categories: EXECUTIVE, CHRONOLOGY, EVIDENCE, GROUNDS, SENTENCING, COMMON_GROUNDS, OUTCOME, PRECEDENT, STATUTORY, STRATEGY, SUBMISSIONS, HEARING, FORMS, ACTION, PLAIN_ENGLISH

classify_section_function.details: classifySection function at line 675 iterates over MERGE_CATEGORIES and uses keyword patterns to categorise sections

parse_analysis_function.details: parseAnalysis function at line 685 splits report content into sections by ## headings using regex headerMatch

merge_all_reports_category_logic.details: mergeAllReports at line 737 uses categoryBuckets Map, classifySection for categorisation, picks LONGEST content from MOST DETAILED report, appends unique content if <55% word overlap

clean_sentence_truncation.details: cleanSentence at line 342 truncates to max 80 characters: if (c.length > 80) c = c.substring(0, 77) + '...'

old_functions_removed.details: selectDistinctParagraphs and buildSynthesisSection functions are NOT present in the file (confirmed removed)

section_title_colors.details: Section titles use text-slate-900 (dark visible text). Line 1753 shows: className='text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 uppercase tracking-wide'

table_of_contents_structure.details: TOC at line 1181 shows fixed structural sections I-VI plus merged category sections from parsedContent.sections

frontend_compilation.details: Frontend builds successfully with yarn build. Only ESLint warnings (missing dependencies in useEffect), no errors

all_pages_load.details: Landing, How It Works, FAQ, About pages all load without console errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 88 verified BarristerView.jsx merge logic rewrite. Key changes: 1) NEW approach uses 15 MERGE_CATEGORIES with keyword patterns instead of Jaccard similarity. 2) Each report section gets classified into a category via classifySection(). 3) For each category, the LONGEST content from the MOST DETAILED report (extensive > full > quick) is used. 4) Unique content from other reports is appended if <55% word overlap. 5) This produces ~10-15 coherent sections instead of 20+ scattered duplicates. 6) Old functions selectDistinctParagraphs and buildSynthesisSection removed. 7) Section titles now use text-slate-900 (visible dark text). Note: Barrister View cannot be tested end-to-end without actual case data and Emergent Google Auth login.
